slogan: The hardest choices require strongest of wills.
discription: This universe is finite, its resources, finite… if life is left unchecked, life will cease to exist. The universe requires correction. I know what it’s like to lose. To feel so desperately that you’re right, yet to fail nonetheless. If you don't vote me, I’ll do it myself.
